ddls:
CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "dbid" INTEGER /* Database ID where the query was executed */,
  "userid" INTEGER /* User ID who executed the query */,
  "query" TEXT /* Query text */,
  "plans" INTEGER /* Number of plans generated for the query */,
  "total_plan_time" REAL /* Total plan time for the query */,
  "min_plan_time" REAL /* Minimum plan time for the query */,
  "max_plan_time" REAL /* Maximum plan time for the query */,
  "mean_plan_time" REAL /* Mean plan time for the query */,
  "stddev_plan_time" REAL /* Standard deviation of plan time for the query */,
  "query_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query started */,
  "query_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query ended */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of the query (e.g., SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "query_labels" TEXT /* JSON array of labels or tags for categorizing queries */,
  "query_comments" TEXT /* Text field for any additional comments or notes about the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_userid FOREIGN KEY ("userid") REFERENCES users ("userid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_dbid FOREIGN KEY ("dbid") REFERENCES databases ("dbid")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query execution */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Query ID being executed */,
  "calls" INTEGER /* Number of calls to the query */,
  "total_exec_time" REAL /* Total execution time for the query */,
  "min_exec_time" REAL /* Minimum execution time for the query */,
  "max_exec_time" REAL /* Maximum execution time for the query */,
  "mean_exec_time" REAL /* Mean execution time for the query */,
  "stddev_exec_time" REAL /* Standard deviation of execution time for the query */,
  "rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows returned by the query */,
  "execution_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the execution started */,
  "execution_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the execution ended */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the execution (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "execution_plan" TEXT /* JSON object containing the detailed execution plan */,
  "execution_labels" TEXT /* JSON array of labels or tags for categorizing executions */,
  "execution_comments" TEXT /* Text field for any additional comments or notes about the execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_executions_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource utilization event */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Execution ID associated with the resource utilization event */,
  "shared_blks_hit" INTEGER /* Number of shared blocks hit */,
  "shared_blks_read" INTEGER /* Number of shared blocks read */,
  "shared_blks_dirtied" INTEGER /* Number of shared blocks dirtied */,
  "shared_blks_written" INTEGER /* Number of shared blocks written */,
  "local_blks_hit" INTEGER /* Number of local blocks hit */,
  "local_blks_read" INTEGER /* Number of local blocks read */,
  "local_blks_dirtied" INTEGER /* Number of local blocks dirtied */,
  "local_blks_written" INTEGER /* Number of local blocks written */,
  "temp_blks_read" INTEGER /* Number of temporary blocks read */,
  "temp_blks_written" INTEGER /* Number of temporary blocks written */,
  "blk_read_time" REAL /* Block read time */,
  "blk_write_time" REAL /* Block write time */,
  "wal_records" INTEGER /* Number of WAL records */,
  "wal_fpi" INTEGER /* WAL FPI (Full Page Images) */,
  "wal_bytes" INTEGER /* WAL bytes */,
  "utilization_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource utilization started */,
  "utilization_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource utilization ended */,
  "utilization_status" TEXT /* Status of the resource utilization (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "utilization_comments" TEXT /* Text field for any additional comments or notes about the resource utilization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_utilization_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES query_executions ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "dbid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "dbname" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "db_version" TEXT /* Version of the database */,
  "db_type" TEXT /* Type of the database (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle) */,
  "db_host" TEXT /* Hostname or IP address of the database server */,
  "db_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the database server */,
  "db_size" INTEGER /* Size of the database in bytes */,
  "db_labels" TEXT /* JSON array of labels or tags for categorizing databases */,
  "db_comments" TEXT /* Text field for any additional comments or notes about the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "userid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, analyst) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "user_comments" TEXT /* Text field for any additional comments or notes about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("userid")
)
